eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Waseca, MN; at 10:19 AM on FEB 24, 2019 Effective until 6:19 AM FEB 25, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Waseca County Sheriff has advised no traveling in Waseca County. All roads are closed due to blizzard conditions until further notice. Roads are snow covered, with drifting snow and poor visibility.
